response.justification: While Bogdan brings 20 years of software engineering experience with strong distributed-systems and architectural skills, he is fundamentally misaligned for this role. His C++ experience is minimal (6 months at National Instruments over a decade ago) and his entire career trajectory is in web, mobile, and GIS platforms—not industrial automation or on-premises systems. The role requires deep C++ expertise, industrial-automation domain knowledge, and security standards (IEC 62443, SDL) that are entirely absent from his background. He would require extensive re-training in both C++ and industrial-automation specifics.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering with proven ability to architect distributed systems handling millions of requests
Strong experience building event-driven architectures and microservices—transferable patterns for message-broker-based systems
Demonstrated mentorship and technical leadership through workshops, courses, and open-source projects
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and outdated—last significant work was 10+ years ago, primarily at National Instruments for 6 months
No background in industrial automation, machinery, embedded systems, or on-premises solutions; entire career focused on web, mobile, and GIS platforms
No experience with security standards (IEC 62443, SDL), MQTT protocols, or industrial-specific APIs (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
